data.title: DOJ Leak Probe Under Trump Targeted His FBI Pick: Report
data.description: DOJ obtained phone and email records of members of Congress, staff and journalists under Trump's first presidency, raising concerns about executive overreach.

Wall Street Veteran Slams Fed's Rate Cut Plans: 'Wake Up To Economic Realities'
data.description: Ed Yardeni warns Fed against further rate cuts due to risks of overheating economy and stock market euphoria, while data shows high inflation and strong labor market.

data.title: Why Joby Aviation Stock Is Falling After Hours
data.description: Joby Aviation shares are falling in extended trading Tuesday after the company announced it entered into an equity distribution agreement.
